title: Context Compact
description: A layered compaction pipeline trims cheap context first and calls the LLM summary only when needed.

steps.annotation: The context window is approaching the budget.
Large tool outputs are moved out before expensive summarization.

steps.content:
snip_compact -> trimmed middle messages
micro_compact -> replaced old tool_results with placeholders
steps.annotation: Cheap compaction layers run every turn.

steps.content: token estimate still above threshold -> compact_history()
steps.annotation: Only after cheap passes fail does the runtime ask the LLM for a summary.

steps.content: Summary: user asked for parser refactor; files inspected: cli.py, parser.py; open task: add test.
steps.annotation: The compacted summary replaces older context while preserving task-relevant facts.
